error_signature: Telegram Trigger does not start listening after activation
title: Telegram Trigger not responding after workflow activation
symptom: After activating a workflow with a Telegram Trigger, it does not respond to messages until a node is edited and saved. No error messages are shown in logs or console.
not_this_if: Trigger works after editing and saving a node
No other workflows are using the same bot
root_cause: The Telegram Trigger may not properly register the webhook upon initial activation due to an issue with the API or webhook registration process. This can lead to the trigger not responding until a manual intervention occurs.
fix_steps: Edit any node in the workflow
Test the Telegram Trigger by sending a message
agent_instruction: Edit and save any node in the workflow to activate the Telegram Trigger.
